creator: delphij@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->patched

Dear submitter, 

I actually have a patchset to bring OpenLDAP up-to-date.  Your patch 
lacks an important part - the bsd.ldap.mk should also be changed 
due to shared library bump.  Since this would cause massive rebuild 
I would defer the whole update after 7.1-RELEASE.
